name: Loovie BYO Server (FLUX.2 Klein + LTX-2.3)
summary: Reference Loovie BYO ComfyUI server. Generates images and single-shot video with FLUX.2 Klein and LTX-2.3 directly into the Loovie iOS app. Free at the Loovie layer (RunPod still bills for GPU time).

env.description: Strong random token. Generate locally with `bash scripts/new-token.sh` and paste here. The server refuses remote requests when this is unset.
HuggingFace read token. Required to download gated models (Gemma text encoder, FLUX.2 weights). See docs/25-huggingface-and-gated-models.md.
Set to 1 to auto-download models on first boot. Set to 0 once your volume is populated to skip the check.
Which model sets to download: `images`, `videos`, or `all`. Disk budget: images ~24 GB, videos ~70 GB, all ~99 GB.

gpuRecommendations.tested_at_launch: Image models verified on 4090 and 5090. Video models verified ONLY on 5090. Other GPUs may work but are unverified.

_loovie_meta.referral_disclosure: The 'Deploy to RunPod' button in our docs uses Loovie's RunPod referral link (?ref=vg16q1rz). It supports Loovie at no extra cost to you. See docs/30-runpod.md.
_loovie_meta.cost_note: RunPod bills you per-minute for GPU time and per-GB for volume storage. Loovie itself charges nothing for BYO generations. Stop the pod when you are done.
